one_line_summary: Solid six-phase TDD tool wired into CLI and slash command with ADR and docs, but tests mostly mock phases and code has leftover cruft.
strengths: ADR-076 covers problem, alternatives, and Driver/Navigator contract clearly
Real wiring: subcommand, slash command, tool registry, reusing run_agent/coder/reviewer
README, wiki page, sidebar, and Multi-Agent section all updated coherently
weaknesses: Stray slash_commands.py.tmp file left in tree; duplicate Coordinator Mode heading inserted in Multi-Agent.md
Phase validation relies on brittle substring matching (e.g. 'fail' in text) and tests largely mock phase methods rather than exercising the real contract
E2E test references undefined Mock and never verified to run; pass/fail detection in metadata is heuristic
